title: Profile
description: A profile — the displayable identity for any agent, person, group, or space. Lowest common denominator of a presence in the system.

avatar.description: Optional avatar image as a Media object.

links.description: External links — websites, social profiles, and other URIs.

label.description: Optional short display label for the link.

description.description: Optional longer description of the link.

uri.description: Canonical reference to the media — an attachment://<id> ref (opaque, host-scoped) or any other URI. Always present.

cid.description: Optional content commitment — CIDv1, raw codec (0x55), sha2-256, base32 lowercase, computed over the media bytes exactly as stored/served. May be absent when no cid has been computed for the media.

href.description: Optional resolution hint — a plain URL where the bytes may currently be fetched. Implementation-dependent and non-normative; carries no integrity promise.
